summary: Glass-partitioned private cabin (director/manager office) viewed at t34, fully finished and furnished. A black-framed glass partition with a hinged glass door separates it from the open workspace; two adjacent balcony-facing window runs are dressed with grey vertical louvre blinds. The room has a large desk with dual wide monitors plus a CCTV multi-camera monitor, a grey credenza, executive chairs and a green/orange lounge sofa. Electrical: two wall split-AC indoor units, two ceiling fans, gypsum false ceiling with cove LED and recessed downlights, 2-3 modular switch/socket plates, and a CCTV monitoring screen. No plumbing fixtures are visible. Surfaces are painted, tiled and defect-free; only minor issues are loose cabling under the desk and a cable trailing down the wall to a floor-level socket.
